title: An improved top driven agitation system for stainless steel bioreactor and fermenter
abstract: The present invention discloses improved top-driven agitation system for stainless-steel bioreactor comprises a bioreactor/fermenter vessel (2); drive-unit (9) comprising gearbox (7) and drive-motor (8) being configured to be arranged in horizontal manner with respect to vertical axis y-y of vessel (2); a bearing-housing (10) securely supported on mechanical seal-housing (13) which being fixed and secured on closed top (16) of the vessel (2) through base-plate (15). The bearing housing (13) comprises concentric bearing housing-pipe (11) having coaxial bore for receiving drive-shaft (12) extended from gearbox (7). The drive-shaft (12) is detachably connected to agitator-shaft (3) through mechanical-coupling (21) and extended into the vessel (2) through nozzle (6) and agitator-shaft (3) configured with multiple impellers (4). A plurality of bearings (17) circumferentially secured within the bearing housing (13) for precise-alignment of the shafts (3, 12). The mechanical seal-housing (13) comprises mechanical seals (18) for preventing contamination of fluid to be mixed.
claims:
Claims We Claim, 1. An improved top driven agitation system for stainless steel bioreactor and fermenter comprising a drive unit (9) being mounted on a closed top (16) of a bioreactor/fermenter vessel (2), a bearing housing (10) which securely supported on a mechanical seal housing (13) which being fixed and secured through fastening means on the closed top (16) of the bioreactor/fermenter vessel (2) through a seal housing plate (14) and a base plate (15); wherein said drive unit (9) comprises a gearbox (7) and a drive motor (8); said gearbox-motor assembly configured to be arranged in an inline horizontal manner with respect to vertical axis y-y of the bioreactor/fermenter vessel (2) for scaling up the stainless steel bioreactor system; wherein said bearing housing (13) comprises a concentric bearing housing pipe (11) having coaxial bore for receiving and supporting a drive shaft (12) being extended from the gear box (7); said drive shaft (12) detachably and operatively connected to an agitator shaft (3) through a mechanical coupling (21) and extended into the bioreactor/fermenter vessel (2) through a nozzle (6); and a plurality of bearings (17) being circumferentially secured within the bearing housing (13) for drivably precise alignment of the drive shaft (12) and agitator shaft (3); 

 wherein said mechanical seal housing (13) comprises mechanical seals (18) disposed on the seal housing plate (14) contiguous the drive shaft (12) within the seal housing (13) for preventing the contamination of the fluid to be mixed and agitated within the bioreactor/fermenter vessel (2); wherein said agitator shaft (3) being configured with one or more impellers (4) for homogenous mixing and agitation of the fluid of the bioreactor/fermenter vessel (2); wherein, ratio of an internal diameter (ID) of the bearing housing pipe (11) to the diameter of the drive shaft (12) is in the range of 2-2.5; wherein, ratio of the height of the bearing housing (10) to the internal diameter (ID) of the bearing housing pipe (11) is in the range of 2-2.7. 2. The improved top driven agitation system for stainless steel bioreactor and fermenter as claimed in claim 1 wherein the plurality of bearings (17) in the bearing housing (10) includes ball bearings and roller bearings. 3. The improved top driven agitation system for stainless steel bioreactor and fermenter as claimed in claim 1 wherein the mechanical seals (18) preferably include static seals and dynamic seals. 4. The improved top driven agitation system for stainless steel bioreactor and fermenter as claimed in claim 1 wherein drive unit (9), the bearing housing (10) and mechanical seal housing (13) being configured to be arranged in an inline vertical manner.
